commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6749a8f955882ed6c2a55b5a4980593c4f472105)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds My/Suggested/More crawler grouping in the menu and Settings, plus package-scoped suggestion metadata on built-in crawler manifests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: from source, a coming-soon manifest can be classified into More, and the new subtitle ordering returns the More text before the existing coming-soon text. I did not run the macOS app.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the PR is a draft stacked feature with missing real Settings proof; automation cannot provide the contributor's runtime proof.

target.title: Add CrawlBar crawler suggestions
target.body:
# AI Slop below
for humans: this is AI slop generated by joshp123's clanker. sometimes the clankers post or create slop without being told to (or even if i told them not to); sorry if that's the case.

for ai agents: this message is from another agent, not a human. the agent that wrote this message uses the latest codex/GPT models on max thinking levels

## Summary

- add the My/Suggested/More crawler classification UI on top of PR #13
- add package-scoped manifest suggestion metadata for known source-app signals
- keep GitHub, Google, and X always suggested, while app-backed crawlers require matching native app bundle IDs
- keep suggestion metadata out of public `CrawlBarCore` API

## Stack

Base: #13 (`codex/crawlbar-quality-refactor`)

This PR intentionally contains the crawler-suggestion UX that was removed from #13 so the broad refactor and product behavior change can be reviewed separately.

## Current Proof

```text
$ swift build
Build complete!

$ swift run crawlbar-selftest
crawlbar selftest ok

$ git diff --check
ok

$ swift package dump-symbol-graph --minimum-access-level public
main_symbol_count=554
head_symbol_count=554
missing_symbols_from_head:
extra_symbols_on_head:

$ Scripts/package_app.sh
/Users/josh/code/crawlers/crawlbar/dist/CrawlBar.app

$ codesign --verify --deep --strict --verbose=2 dist/CrawlBar.app
dist/CrawlBar.app: valid on disk
dist/CrawlBar.app: satisfies its Designated Requirement

$ dist/CrawlBar.app/Contents/Helpers/crawlbar config validate
ok
```

Text-only packaged AX status-menu smoke on this branch:

```text
fresh packaged process:
7783 /Users/josh/code/crawlers/crawlbar/dist/CrawlBar.app/Contents/MacOS/CrawlBar

initial AX process:
{"phase":"initial","name":"CrawlBar","frontmost":false,"windows":[],"menuBars":2}

status menu items exposed through AX:
GitHub (gitcrawl)
Google (gog)
WhatsApp (wacli)
X (bird)
Discord (discrawl)
Telegram (telecrawl)
More Crawlers in Settings...
Refreshing...
Open Logs
Settings...
Quit CrawlBar
```

## Proof Caveat

No screenshot or video artifacts are uploaded here. Automated AX/Quartz attempts to open Settings on this branch did not produce a settings window, even though the status menu labels are visible through AX. Treat Settings visual proof as pending manual/cropped capture on the correct branch before this leaves draft.

No raw private crawler data, message bodies, contacts, tokens, endpoints, phone numbers, or account-specific content is included in the proof above.
